top3.sql:
SELECT s_store_name, SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
WHERE d_date BETWEEN '2002-01-01' AND '2002-01-31'
  AND s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state = 'CA'
      AND ca_county = 'Santa Clara County'
  )
GROUP BY s_store_name
ORDER BY total_net_profit;

SELECT s_store_name, SUM(ss_net_profit) AS net_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
WHERE d_date BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2000-01-31'
  AND s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('CA', 'TX', 'NY')
  )
GROUP BY s_store_name
ORDER BY net_profit;

SELECT s_store_name, SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
WHERE d_date BETWEEN '2002-01-01' AND '2002-01-31'
  AND s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state = 'CA'
      AND ca_county = 'Santa Clara County'
  )
GROUP BY s_store_name
ORDER BY total_net_profit;

WITH filtered_stores AS (
  SELECT s_store_name, s_store_sk, s_zip
  FROM store
  WHERE s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('CA', 'TX', 'NY')
  )
)
SELECT s.s_store_name, SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS net_profit
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN filtered_stores s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
WHERE d.d_date BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2000-01-31'
GROUP BY s.s_store_name
ORDER BY net_profit;

SELECT s_store_name, SUM(ss_net_profit) AS net_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
WHERE d_date BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2000-01-31'
  AND s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('CA', 'TX', 'NY')
  )
GROUP BY s_store_name
ORDER BY net_profit;

SELECT s_store_name, SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
WHERE d_date BETWEEN '2002-01-01' AND '2002-01-31'
  AND s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state = 'CA'
      AND ca_county = 'Santa Clara County'
  )
GROUP BY s_store_name
ORDER BY total_net_profit;

WITH filtered_stores AS (
  SELECT s_store_name, s_store_sk, s_zip
  FROM store
  WHERE s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('CA', 'TX', 'NY')
  )
)
SELECT s.s_store_name, SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS net_profit
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN filtered_stores s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
WHERE d.d_date BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2000-01-31'
GROUP BY s.s_store_name
ORDER BY net_profit;

WITH filtered_stores AS (
  SELECT s_store_name, s_store_sk, s_zip
  FROM store
  WHERE s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('CA', 'TX', 'NY')
  )
)
SELECT s.s_store_name, SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS net_profit
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN filtered_stores s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
WHERE d.d_date >= '2000-01-01' AND d.d_date <= '2000-01-31'
GROUP BY s.s_store_name
ORDER BY net_profit DESC;

final.sql:
SELECT s_store_name, SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
WHERE d_date BETWEEN '2002-01-01' AND '2002-01-31'
  AND s_zip IN (
    SELECT ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state = 'CA'
      AND ca_county = 'Santa Clara County'
  )
GROUP BY s_store_name
ORDER BY total_net_profit;
